programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends go to the dawn of the duel, to the place where it all began, to the land where the Pharaoh's mysteries lie: Egypt.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The past is quickly becoming perilous as the fearless bandit king Bakura has invaded the Pharaoh's palace to take down the keepers of the seven Millennium Items single-handedly!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Even with the potent power of Obelisk the Tormentor, the Pharaoh couldn't prevent the bandit Bakura from escaping. Everyone knows that thief will return for a rematch, so Seto has a plan to create a powerful army.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad vows to stop the bandit king Bakura's sneak attacks once and for all, but he may have made a promise he can't keep!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad, the first of the Pharaoh's guardians, has fallen. Even worse, the bandit king Bakura now has the Millennium Ring, making his Diabound even more unstoppable!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origins of the Millennium Items are revealed! Who forged these powerful artifacts, and why were they created? Though the Millennium Items are powerful, such power comes with a heavy price... a debt that may never be able to be repaid!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh calls forth the mighty Egyptian God Slifer the Sky Dragon to fight the bandit Bakura's Diabound, but when Diabound starts attacking the townspeople, the Pharaoh must protect them, even if it means sacrificing himself!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The bandit Bakura has stolen the Millennium Puzzle and sent the Pharaoh plummeting into the abyss. Now he's another step closer to obtaining all seven Millennium Items and resurrecting the malevolent Zorc, the greatest evil of all time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the Pharaoh are reunited, but the Pharaoh is powerless without the Millennium Puzzle! However, that won't stop the Pharaoh from a final showdown against the bandit king Bakura.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the showdown in the sands between the bandit Bakura and his ever-growing Diabound versus the Pharaoh, Mahad the Dark Magician, and the remaining guardians of the Pharaoh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the help of his father's spirit, the Pharaoh and his guardians defeated the bandit Bakura's Diabound and stopped the horrible Zorc from resurrecting... or did they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh's journey was more than a trip to the past, it's the greatest Shadow Game ever created. Yami Yugi and Yami Bakura's Shadow Game has already reached apocalyptic proportions, but it's only the beginning of cataclysmic events!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Zorc's incredible shadow energies have resurrected the bandit Bakura and his Diabound. With a second chance at revenge, the bandit king has broken up the Pharaoh's team so that he can divide and conquer them one at a time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The hope of mankind rests on Yugi's shoulders as he arrives at the final temple chamber where the Pharaoh's name is located, but something unexpected is waiting for them - a sinister surprise that can cost them their lives!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After a nearly eternal slumber, the all-powerful Zorc has resurrected, plunging the world into darkness!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and his guardians are down to their last line of defense as Shada falls victim to Zorc. The Pharaoh desperately wants to summon the three Egyptian Gods, but he can't without his Millennium Puzzle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Exodia the Forbidden One couldn't defeat Zorc! Exodia was able to buy enough time for the Pharaoh to get his Millennium Puzzle back-he can now summon the almighty Egyptian Gods! It's time for the Pharaoh's counterattack in the biggest brawl.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated. The Pharaoh is severely hurt and unable to stop Zorc from setting fire to the city, but our heroes aren't giving up. It's not double vision when Seto and Kaiba transcend time to confront Zorc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba's combined strength couldn't defeat Zorc. Yugi must give the Pharaoh his name, but Yugi doesn't know how to read ancient Egyptian text. All bets are off in the final clash where Yugi must protect the past to save the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pharaoh Atem, Yugi, and friends have defeated the bandit Bakura and Zorc, but the final test still awaits! Yugi must duel Atem! As they set sail to the final dueling grounds, everyone realizes this may be the final night Yugi and Atem have together.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi defeats Atem, Yugi will prove he's ready to stand on his own, and Atem can join his friends in the world beyond. But Yugi and Atem will be separated forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem has summoned all three Egyptian Gods! What chance does Yugi have against these powerful creatures that no one has been able to defeat? Yugi better think of a strategy quickly or this duel will be over soon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem still has all three Egyptian God Cards, Yugi doesn't have a single monster on the field! Yugi claims that he has a combo that will defeat the Egyptian Gods, but is he simply bragging, or does he actually have a plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Atem - more than friends, closer than brothers. Will they stay together, or is it time to say goodbye? It's the final answer, the final duel, and the final time we will see our friends in the rousing conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi's Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa's soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister's eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi's deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Monster Machines are eager to see Darington's stunt track, but Crusher tricks Darington, sending him far away.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When a mysterious bandit makes off with Blaze's metallic trophy, he must track down the culprit.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Gasquatch has been saving his money to buy a toy, but when his money goes missing Blaze must help him find it before the toy store closes.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and Gabby meet a brand new monster machine named Watts - a super fast truck with electric tires; but when one of her special tires goes rolling into the jungle, Blaze, AJ, and Gabby promise to help her get it back.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: It's time for the Gold Medal Games, and Blaze is ready to compete; when Crusher cheats and sends his rival flying away, Blaze must return to Axle City to win the gold medal.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: AJ and Stripes test their explorer skills as they follow the trail to the fabled Tiger Treasure.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Challenged by a tough-talking falcon, Blaze takes off on a journey to earn his place with the fast fliers in the sky above Animal Island.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Pickle puts on a magic show for all of Axle City; when Crusher accidentally makes a magical mistake, it's up to Blaze and Pickle to fix the magic and save their friends.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When Starla, the friendly cowgirl truck, loses one of her pistons, Blaze and AJ try to get it back before Crusher can take it.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Brody has to rescue his turbo-surfing pals when they get caught in the Shipwreck Cove whirlpool; Brody and Team Top Wing race to the rescue when Brody's little sister slips off the top of Puffin Peak.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Brody earns his HQ Command Flyer Pilot's badge when Shirley accidentally launches the Command Flyer; Baddy McBat takes Brody's Splash-Diver so he can make off with rare, precious purple pearls.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: When pirates take the island's precious lemons, the cadets must bring the treasure back to the Lemon Shack; while earning her Map Reading Badge, Penny finds pirates and must rescue the rest of the Top Wing Team.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Rod's beloved Rooster Brewster goes missing in `Arrgh Me Snugglies'; then in `Earl the Gadget Squirrel', Earl the Gadget Squirrel builds Shirley a delivery drone that goes out of control.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Cap'n Dilly's dance party gets lost at sea at night; Brody faces his fear of the dark; the Team Top Wing Cadets must learn to work together to earn their CoPilot Badges.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Cap'n Dilly and the Cadets build a Pirate Playzone in Ker-Splash Canyon; the Dodos think Brody is the legendary Dodo King and do whatever he says until Baddy McBat takes the crown.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: When Sandy Stork loses her glasses and mixes up the eggs in her delivery, Top Wing races to get the right eggs back home before they hatch; Chomps and Rocco take Big Swirl's famous pearls.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Blackbelt's Grandma Ninja has awesome moves; when she gets a nasty cold, Blaze, AJ and Blackbelt set out to make the most powerful medicine there is: ninja soup.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Axle City is enjoying the balloon fair until Crusher and Pickle get stuck on a runaway hot air balloon; now, it's up to Blaze and AJ to rescue their high-flying friends before they crash into the Slime Volcano.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When all the members of Pickle's family get lost in the woods, Pickle teams up with Tow Truck Blaze to come to their rescue.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Blaze and his friends must race to get to their Halloween candy after Crusher's plan to steal it goes awry, sending their treats far away from Axle City.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When his tires get popped, Blaze thinks he's out of the race for good; luckily, Gabby is there with a new set of Power Tires, high-tech wheels that can transform into anything Blaze needs to keep rolling.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: After a big bubble floats away with Gabby's new puppy, she teams up with Blaze and AJ to try to get him back.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Big Rig Blaze is called upon to make three big deliveries all over Axle City, but might need help to finish in time.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Sir Blaze and Sir AJ as they embark on a quest to free a magical unicorn from an unpoppable bubble.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: The Cadets send stressed Shirley on a remote treetop cabin vacation when she accidentally unmoors the cabin; Baddy wants to be in Reg Goosling's best adventure picture ever, but the Cadets rescue Baddy and end up in the picture instead.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: When Rocco and Chomps race off in Penny's Aqua-Wing, she must use Chomp's sub to get it back; as Sandy Stork delivers party treats to the school, the Banana Bandits take her plane.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Penny races to save the lost treasure of Shipwreck Cove and Commodore Smurkturkski; when Rod has to stay in bed with a cold, Penny has to learn to pilot the Road-Wing on the fly.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Della helps Survivor Bear explore Ker-Splash's secret caves; the cadets must escape before they're locked in forever; Baddy cheats to try to win the Ker-Splash Canyon Race, and the cadets have to rescue the other racers.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: When a train loaded with recycling rolls out of control, it's Top Wing to the rescue; when Penny's friend Anyu throws a Friendship Party, Team Top Wing races into action to make sure everyone gets there on time.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: When a falling tree threatens Shirley's home, the Cadets invite her to sleep over; Betty McBat challenges Rod to see who is faster, but when Baddy tries to cheat, Rod has to rescue Betty.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: When Brody's turbo-surfin' friends get trapped in a cave, Brody and Penny race against the tide to rescue them; the Cadets try to earn a badge by running the Lemon Shack.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When a nefarious villain steals every toothbrush in Axle City, Blaze's only chance at saving the day is to become Special Mission Blaze.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: At the Axle City Fair, Blaze and AJ realize they do not have enough coins to use the new Supersize Prize Machine; Blaze earns money by getting three different jobs, transforming into super-cool vehicles to take care of business.
